settings.heading: Gold Medal Price in India (Custom)
settings.subheading: What does a (custom) gold medal cost in India? Clear pricing for gold-finish sports and event medals — not bullion, but bright gold-plated medals with ribbons and custom centres. By Meru Trophy.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices in India. Final price depends on size, material and engraving. Bulk discounts apply. GST invoice available.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Custom gold-finish medals in India start around ₹25 per piece in bulk (gold-plated alloy, not solid gold), rising with size, custom centres and die-striking. These are award medals, not bullion. Meru Trophy quotes exact rates on WhatsApp (+91 78922 07252).

settings.heading: What you'll pay and why
settings.text: When people search "gold medal price" for an event, they mean a gold-finished award medal, not solid gold bullion. These are gold-plated alloy medals — bright, durable and affordable — starting around ₹25 in bulk, with custom-centre and die-struck options costing more. (Solid-gold bullion pricing is a separate market and not what we supply.)

settings.question: Is this a real gold medal?
settings.answer: It's a gold-finished (gold-plated alloy) award medal — bright and durable — not solid gold bullion.

settings.question: How much is a gold award medal in India?
settings.answer: From about ₹25 each in bulk, more for custom-centre and die-struck pieces.

settings.question: Can it carry our event or logo?
settings.answer: Yes — custom centres with your event name, sport or logo.

settings.heading: Want an exact price?
settings.text: Send your item, quantity and engraving — we'll send a precise quote, usually within the hour.
